name: TMDB Movie Request
description: TMDB movie/TV request system with multi-key rotation and media library check

fulfill_webhook_url.title: Fulfill Webhook URL
fulfill_webhook_url.description: When a request is marked as fulfilled (✓), POST the request data to this URL. Leave empty to disable. Query-param auth can be appended directly (e.g. ?token=xxx).

fulfill_webhook_header_name.title: Webhook Auth Header Name
fulfill_webhook_header_name.description: Auth header name, e.g. Authorization, X-Api-Key, X-Token. Leave empty for no auth header.

fulfill_webhook_header_value.title: Webhook Auth Header Value
fulfill_webhook_header_value.description: Auth header value, e.g. Bearer eyJhbGci... or my-secret-key.

uninstall.confirm_message: This will delete all movie request data including request history and TMDB API keys.
